The All-Merciful
taught the RecitalFootnote-1
created man,
and taught him clear expression.
The sun and the moon move according to plan,
and the plantsFootnote-2and the trees prostrate themselves.
And the sky—He raised it and set up the balance,
so doFootnote-3not exceed in the balance,
but maintain the weights justly and do not fall short in the balance.
And the earth—He set it up for living creatures;
in it are fruits and sheathed palm trees,
and grainsFootnote-4 in the blades, and fragrant plants.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-5disbelieve inFootnote-6?
He created man from potter’s clay like pottery
and created the unseen beingFootnote-7from a smokeless flame of fire.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-8disbelieve in?
Lord of the two Easts and Lord of the two Wests.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-9disbelieve in?
He merged the two watersFootnote-10, converging together;
between them is a barrier which they do not overrun.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-11disbelieve in?
From them come outFootnote-12 pearls and corals.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-13disbelieve in?
His are the running ships, whose sails are raisedFootnote-14 in the sea like bannersFootnote-15.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-16disbelieve in?
Everyone upon itFootnote-17is bound to perish,
and all that remains is yourFootnote-18Lord’s Countenance, the Possessor of majesty and nobility.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-19disbelieve in?
Everyone in the heavens and the earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-20disbelieve in?
WeFootnote-21 will attendto youFootnote-22, O two huge communitiesFootnote-23.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-24disbelieve in?
O society of unseen beings and humans, if youFootnote-25can penetrate the bounds of the heavens and the earth then go ahead and penetrate; you will never penetrate except with authorityFootnote-26.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-27disbelieve in?
Flares of fire, and brassFootnote-28 , will be sent upon youFootnote-29, and you will not find help.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-30disbelieve in?
And when the sky ruptures and becomes rose-colored like oil—
so which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-31disbelieve in?
On that day neither any human nor unseen beingFootnote-32is asked about his misdeeds.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-33disbelieve in?
The criminals are recognized by their marks then taken by the forelocks and the feet.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-34disbelieve in?
This is Hell in which the criminals disbelieve;
they circulate between it and an intensely scalding water.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-35disbelieve in?
But for whoever feared standing before his Lord there are two Gardens(in Paradise) .
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-36disbelieve in?
Both having varieties.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-37disbelieve in?
In them are two flowing springs.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-38disbelieve in?
In them, of every kind of fruit there is apair.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-39disbelieve in?
Reclining on furnishings lined with brocade, and the yield of the two Gardens are near at hand.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-40disbelieve in?
In them are bashful maidens, untouched before by any human or unseen beingFootnote-41.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-42disbelieve in?
Like rubies and corals.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-43disbelieve in?
Is the repayment of kindness anything but kindness?
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-44disbelieve in?
And beneath them are two gardens.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-45disbelieve in?
Both of deepest green.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-46disbelieve in?
In them are two gushing springs.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-47disbelieve in?
In them are fruits and date-palms and pomegranates.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-48disbelieve in?
In them are good, beautiful ones.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-49disbelieve in?
Spouses with lovely wide eyes, secluded in pavilions.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-50disbelieve in?
Untouched before by any human or unseen beingFootnote-51.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-52disbelieve in?
Reclining on green cushions and exquisite carpets.
So which of your Lord’s marvels do youFootnote-53disbelieve in?
Supremely Blessed be the Name of yourFootnote-54Lord,the PossessorFootnote-55 ofmajesty and nobility.
